shape.entryPoint: string — filesystem path to the single browser-openable entry HTML of the assembled app
shape.runtimeDependencies: array of strings — the external runtime dependencies the artifact loads in production (here: the public OpenStreetMap Overpass API endpoint and the OSM geocoding endpoint), which section-5 must NOT substitute, mock away, or stub when exercising edge cases

notes: section-5 (edge-case testing) depends on the pseudo-node 'integrator' — it runs only after the integrator has assembled sections 1-4 into one artifact. section-5 opens entryPoint the way a real user does and exercises every edge_case_testing-verifier assertion under production fidelity: it may simulate environmental conditions (deny geolocation, force offline, induce timeouts, supply controlled coordinates) but must NOT replace the runtimeDependencies the artifact genuinely loads in production. section-5 reports pass/fail; it does not modify feature code.
